email_subject: Application for Customer Service Medewerker at VIVALDIS
email_body:
Dear VIVALDIS team,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker position in Hasselt, as advertised via VIVALDIS. With a background in digital marketing and customer-facing roles, I bring strong communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work under pressure.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client communications, respond to inquiries, and ensure accurate information flow—skills directly transferable to handling phone calls and emails in a customer service environment. I am comfortable with MS Office and various digital tools, and I thrive in organized, deadline-driven settings.

I speak English (professional) and Turkish (native), with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am available for the weekend + Friday shift or weekday schedule as required.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker position at VIVALDIS in Hasselt. With a strong foundation in digital marketing and customer interaction, I am confident in my ability to excel in this role.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites and communications, ensuring accuracy and timely updates. This role has honed my ability to gather information, verify details, and keep all parties informed—core duties of the customer service officer position. I am adept at using MS Office and various digital tools, and I maintain a high level of organization even under pressure.

My experience extends to handling multiple tasks simultaneously, from responding to emails to monitoring project deadlines. I am a social person with strong communication skills, and I pay close attention to detail. I am also stress-resistant, having worked in fast-paced environments like logistics at Katoen Natie.

I speak English (professional) and Turkish (native), with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am flexible regarding shifts, including weekends and evenings, and I am eager to contribute to a leading international company.

I am particularly drawn to this role because of the emphasis on work-life balance and the opportunity to grow within a dynamic team. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how my skills can benefit VIVALDIS.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Strong communication skills from client-facing digital marketing role
Experience handling phone calls and emails, gathering and verifying information
Proficient in MS Office and digital tools, with attention to detail
Stress-resistant and organized, proven in fast-paced logistics environment
Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch A2 and improving
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with strong communication and organizational skills, experienced in customer-facing roles. At Episto, I manage client communications, respond to inquiries, and ensure accurate information flow. I am comfortable with MS Office and digital tools, detail-oriented, and stress-resistant. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: handling phone calls and emails, gathering and verifying information, updating stakeholders, monitoring agreements
- MS Office & computer proficiency: MS Office suite, Google Workspace, various digital platforms
- Organizational & time management: managing multiple tasks, meeting deadlines, working under pressure
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- SEO & content: on-page SEO, keyword research, content writing, WordPress
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Respond to client inquiries and manage communications, ensuring accuracy and completeness of information
- Write keyword-targeted blog content and manage content updates on client websites
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with various tools to guide decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, including full site structure and social media integration
- Implemented structured data and technical SEO audits

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
